files_touched.reason: Replaced references to non-existent vendor.blog columns (path, is_active, created_at) with actual columns: domain (direct), source_url (parsed via regexp_replace for path), is_accessible, original_created_at. Step 2 JOIN also updated to use regexp_replace for path matching.

Changed bridge_to_article_input() source from 'field_monitor' to 'company_blog' (valid ArticleSource enum). Set title to '[Signal Sweep] {domain}{path}' and content to '[Pending fetch — content_hash changed from {old_hash} to {new_hash}]' as non-None placeholders that satisfy ingest_article() validation.
